examples.title: Numerical Divergence Calculator
examples.description: Computes divergence of 2D vector field using central differences
examples.code:
import numpy as np
def divergence(f, x, y, h=1e-5):
    dfx_dx = (f(x+h,y)[0] - f(x-h,y)[0])/(2*h)
    dfy_dy = (f(x,y+h)[1] - f(x,y-h)[1])/(2*h)
    return dfx_dx + dfy_dy
examples.explanation: Uses central difference approximation for partial derivatives
